title: 3dEntityItem
description: This project add all entity model (3d) of Minecraft on 1 item
body:
# 3dEntityItem
## Add all entity 3d models on paper item
### Work with CustomModelData !!!
**Command to give :**

_/give @p paper[custom_model_data={floats:[1]}]_

![Paper to Dragon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bbbfb07446ae77140f5e5610e995ad919689ba35.png)
![mobs ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12915ad84452eeb2a96da55d10391d8042feb3e5.png)

**How does it work? **

All the textures are on the paper item !



List :


<details>
<summary>CustomModelData Number List !!!</summary>
